title: Diego's Animal Sounds
synopsis: Little Diego discovers different animals and their sounds during a happy walk through the park with his mama, learning to make each sound himself and feeling joy with every new discovery.

pages.text: Diego goes for a walk. What will he hear?

illustration.description: A cheerful toddler boy with warm brown skin, dark curly hair, and bright brown eyes walks hand-in-hand with his mama, a woman with long black hair and kind smile wearing a soft yellow cardigan. They're on a tree-lined path in a sunny park with gentle green hills. The illustration uses soft watercolor pastels with high contrast, featuring rounded shapes and warm lighting.
illustration.alt: Diego walking with his mama in the park

pages.text: A fluffy dog says WOOF WOOF! Diego says WOOF WOOF too!

illustration.description: A golden retriever with a wagging tail sits near Diego, who has his hands cupped around his mouth making barking sounds. His mama smiles warmly beside them. The dog owner, an elderly Black woman in a purple sweater, waves kindly. Soft morning sunlight filters through the scene with pastel yellows and warm browns dominating the color palette.
illustration.alt: Diego barking like a happy dog

pages.text: A little bird says TWEET TWEET! Diego says TWEET TWEET too!

illustration.description: A small blue robin perches on a low branch near Diego's face level. Diego points up excitedly with one finger, his mouth open in a tweeting motion. His mama crouches beside him, also pointing at the bird. The background shows soft green leaves and a pale blue sky, with the bird's bright blue feathers creating nice contrast for little eyes.
illustration.alt: Diego tweeting like a small bird

pages.text: A big cow says MOO MOO! Diego says MOO MOO too!

illustration.description: A friendly black and white cow with gentle eyes looks over a white wooden fence at Diego, who has both hands around his mouth making mooing sounds. A farmer with medium brown skin and overalls tips his hat at them. The scene uses soft pastels with the cow's black and white pattern providing good visual contrast against the pale green grass and blue sky.
illustration.alt: Diego mooing like a gentle cow

pages.text: A soft cat says MEOW MEOW! Diego says MEOW MEOW too!

illustration.description: An orange tabby cat with white paws sits on a garden wall, looking down at Diego who reaches up with both hands, his face scrunched in a meowing expression. The cat's owner, a young woman with curly red hair and freckles, watches from her garden gate with a smile. Warm orange and cream colors dominate with soft purple flowers in the background.
illustration.alt: Diego meowing like an orange cat

pages.text: A happy duck says QUACK QUACK! Diego says QUACK QUACK too!

illustration.description: A yellow duck with an orange beak waddles near a small pond. Diego squats down at the water's edge, his lips pursed in a quacking motion. His mama sits on a bench nearby next to another parent, an Asian man reading to his toddler daughter. The scene features soft blues for the water and warm yellows for the duck, with gentle ripples in the pond.
illustration.alt: Diego quacking like a yellow duck

pages.text: Diego loves all the sounds! WOOF, TWEET, MOO!

illustration.description: Diego claps his hands together with pure joy, his face lit up with the biggest smile. All the animals from the story appear faintly in soft, dreamy colors around him - the dog, bird, cow, cat, and duck. His mama hugs him from behind, both of them laughing. The illustration glows with warm golden light and celebrates the happy moment with soft, swirling shapes.
illustration.alt: Diego clapping happily with all his animal friends

pages.text: MEOW, QUACK! Diego had a wonderful day!

illustration.description: Diego walks home holding his mama's hand, both silhouetted against a gentle sunset. He looks back over his shoulder with a content smile, waving goodbye to the park. A few of the animals can be seen in the distance. The sky is painted in soft pinks, oranges, and purples, creating a peaceful, sleepy-time mood with rounded, gentle shapes throughout.
illustration.alt: Diego and mama walking home at sunset

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What sound does the dog make?
questions.explanation: The fluffy dog says WOOF WOOF, and Diego copies the sound!

questions.question: Who walks with Diego?
questions.explanation: Diego holds hands with his mama as they walk through the park together.

questions.question: What does the cat say?
questions.explanation: The soft cat says MEOW MEOW, and Diego makes that sound too!

pages.text: A fluffy dog says [BLANK]! Diego says [BLANK] too!
A happy [BLANK] says QUACK QUACK! Diego says [BLANK] too!
